title: Tunisian Pine Nut Crumble
description: A sweet and crunchy treat that combines the flavors of Tunisia with the nutty taste of pine nuts.
instructions: Roll out the crumbly pastry and cut into small squares.
Mix the honey and spicy orange marmalade in a small bowl.
Drizzle the honey mixture over the pine nuts and stir to combine.
Place a spoonful of the pine nut mixture onto each pastry square.
Fold the pastry squares into triangles and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with additional honey, if desired.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
